title: The Rendering of Allegiance to al-Hasan b. All
description: In the year 40 (May 17, 66o-May 6, 661), allegiance was rendered to al -Hasan b. 'Ali for the Caliphate. The first to render allegiance to him is said to have been Qays b. Sa'd who said to him, "Hold out your hand, and I will pledge allegiance to you on condition [that you follow] the Book of God, Almighty and Great, and the example (sunnah) of His Prophet, and fight the violators."' Al-Hasan answered him, "...

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 18
